    grouped: dict[str, dict[str, list[str]]] = {}
    subject_order: list[str] = []

    for t in triples:
        s = clean(t.subject)
        p = t.predicate
        o = clean(t.object)
        if s not in grouped:
            grouped[s] = {}
            subject_order.append(s)
        grouped[s].setdefault(p, [])
        if o not in grouped[s][p]:
            grouped[s][p].append(o)

    def build_phrase(p: str, objs: list[str]) -> str:
        m = re.match(r"^(\d+(?:st|nd|rd|th))Runway(LengthFeet|LengthMetre|SurfaceType|Number)$", p)
        if m:
            idx, kind = m.groups()
            if kind == "LengthFeet":
                vals = join_parts([f"{x} feet" for x in objs])
                return f"has its {idx} runway length at {vals}"
            if kind == "LengthMetre":
                vals = join_parts([f"{x} metres" for x in objs])
                return f"has its {idx} runway length at {vals}"
            if kind == "SurfaceType":
                return f"has {join_parts(objs)} as the surface type of its {idx} runway"
            return f"has {join_parts(objs)} as the number of its {idx} runway"

        o_joined = join_parts(objs)
        if p in templates:
            return templates[p].format(o=o_joined)
        return f"has {humanize_predicate(p)} {o_joined}"

    def subject_sentence(s: str) -> str:
        phrases = [build_phrase(p, objs) for p, objs in grouped[s].items()]
        return f"{s} {join_parts(phrases)}"

    known_subjects = set(grouped.keys())
    if len(subject_order) == 1:
        return subject_sentence(subject_order[0]) + "."

    start = subject_order[0]
    used = {start}
    where_clauses: list[str] = []

    changed = True
    while changed:
        changed = False
        for us in list(used):
            for objs in grouped[us].values():
                for o in objs:
                    if o in known_subjects and o not in used:
                        where_clauses.append(f"where {subject_sentence(o)}")
                        used.add(o)
                        changed = True

    remaining = [s for s in subject_order if s not in used]
    text = subject_sentence(start)
    if where_clauses:
        text += ", " + ", ".join(where_clauses)
    if remaining:
        text += ", and " + ", and ".join(subject_sentence(s) for s in remaining)
    return text + "."
